test.description: Native contour source at the corner where four z=12 DEM tiles meet. Each contour tile is generated independently from its own DEM (with neighbour edges backfilled into DEMData::border). The four-tile corner falls at the centre of the viewport: any failure in the algorithm's edge handling (smoothing, clipping, endpoint clamping) would show as a gap or step where contour lines cross the centre cross. line-width=2 so single-pixel endpoint mismatches are visible.
